misc.title: We making fun of it, but it might be really the case that Imu and Joyboy had to survive endless of wars... that both have spoken about world peace because what they witness and gone throught it...
misc.text: We making fun of it, but it might be really the case that Imu and Joyboy had to survive endless of wars... that both have spoken about world peace because what they witness and gone throught it...

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 Reminds me of Vegapunk's words about the fact that he didn't know who was right or wrong back then. I believe that Imu and Joyboy had a common enemy and that they talked about it because
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 Reminds me of Vegapunk's words about the fact that he didn't know who was right or wrong back then. I believe that Imu and Joyboy had a common enemy and that they talked about it because the world was in chaos back then: "The sun spread fires of war". Perhaps Joyboy and Imu grew up under extremely difficult conditions; perhaps the king at the time was Davy Jones, whom they both ultimately defeated? WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1181 We see Imu and Joyboy laughing together, and Imu tells him that domination is what brings peace to the world. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2046909233518477583#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 We see Imu and Joyboy laughing together, and Imu tells him that domination is what brings peace to the world.
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 We see Imu and Joyboy laughing together, and Imu tells him that domination is what brings peace to the world.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 Imu creates a insane large omen, covers his weapon (and himself) with it and it change to a gigantic flail. Later he use Omen again and the weapon change to a black blade, called Nemesis
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 Imu creates a insane large omen, covers his weapon (and himself) with it and it change to a gigantic flail. Later he use Omen again and the weapon change to a black blade, called Nemesis.

misc.title: Birazcık Fenerbahçe’yi düşünüyorsanız Gs maçına Tedesco ile çıkmazsınız..Bu adamı bu gece derhal göndermeliyiz..Bu adam Td falan değil…Bu adam şansa bala buralara kadar gelen bir futbol okulu öğrencis
misc.text: Birazcık Fenerbahçe’yi düşünüyorsanız Gs maçına Tedesco ile çıkmazsınız..Bu adamı bu gece derhal göndermeliyiz..Bu adam Td falan değil…Bu adam şansa bala buralara kadar gelen bir futbol okulu öğrencisi..Bu adamın hayatında aldığı tek bir kupa yok..Bu adam sizi bitirmeden,siz onu bu gece bitirin ve hiç olmazsa GS maçına bir motıvasyon olsun..Bu adamı gönderin bu gece gönderin..
